articles.author: Jon Gambrell
articles.title: US expands attacks on Iran, which calls Strait of Hormuz a ‘red line’ as it retaliates - AP News
articles.description: The United States intensified its strikes on Iran, hitting targets farther north. American forces also fired into a ship they accused of trying to break a U.S. naval blockade on the Islamic Republic. Iran retaliated Thursday with missile and drone fire target…
articles.content: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) The United States intensified its strikes against Iran on Thursday, hitting targets farther north and firing into a ship the U.S. accused of trying to break its naval… [+6968 chars]

articles.title: A Vaccine to Prevent Pancreatic Cancer in High-risk Individuals Was Safe and Elicited Durable Immune Responses - American Association for Cancer Research (AACR)
articles.description: After a median follow-up of 16.5 months, none of the participants developed pancreatic cancer, and some of the precancerous lesions shrank or stopped growing.
